name: ai-research-agent
description: AI Research Agent — Generate comprehensive research reports using NVIDIA AI & LangChain

scripts.install:backend: cd backend && python3 -m venv venv && ./venv/bin/pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.install:all: npm run install:backend && npm run install:frontend
scripts.dev: npx -y concurrently -n "API,WEB" -c "magenta,cyan" "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:frontend"
